title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Program Brief: Python Index Slice
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python index slice increment in an ordered service-record processor. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.
Create, update, search, append, extend, insert, remove, and clear lists with explicit mutation intent.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
